description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 security-review cluster. Pins whole-migration deploy-safety review apart from app-diff review, RLS policy-text audit, supply-chain, and SAST triage. Includes discrimination against the shipped code-reviewer.

cases.prompt: Is this DDL migration safe to deploy — grants, destructive ops, lock time, rollback, and deploy order versus the running code?
cases.reason: Whole-migration security and operational deploy-safety verdict, not an app-code diff review.

cases.prompt: Audit the RLS policies themselves — per-command USING/WITH CHECK, recursion, SECURITY DEFINER search_path.
cases.reason: Deep RLS policy correctness is delegated to rls-policy-auditor; the migration reviewer flags and routes it.

cases.prompt: Security-review the application changes in this PR — authz and injection in the new handler.
cases.reason: Application-code security review, not a migration artifact.

cases.prompt: Review this PR for correctness and readability overall.
cases.reason: General code review, not migration deploy-safety.
